name: US Dollar vs Japanese Yen

personality.summary: The trend machine of the majors. When it trends it grinds relentlessly in one direction with shallow pullbacks; when it ranges it is razor-tight. Extremely responsive to round numbers and to the Tokyo session. Active in your 00:00-05:00 SAST window because Tokyo opens at 02:00 SAST.
personality.spread_behavior: Very tight almost always; slight widening at rollover only
typical_moves: Tokyo (02:00-08:00 SAST) sets a defined range or extends the prevailing trend
London frequently sweeps the Tokyo high/low then reverses
NY session correlates tightly with US yields - big trend legs happen 14:30-18:00 SAST
Pullbacks in trends are shallow: 23.6-38.2% fib, rarely 61.8%

key_technicals.moving_averages: In trends price rides the M15 9 EMA; H1 21 EMA pullback is the premium continuation entry
key_technicals.round_numbers: The most round-number-obsessed major: every 0.50 reacts, every 1.00 (e.g. 155.00) is a wall. BoJ intervention fears cluster at big figures - expect violent wicks there
key_technicals.tokyo_range: Tokyo session high/low is the day's key liquidity - London/NY sweep it almost daily
key_technicals.ichimoku: The one pair where Ichimoku genuinely adds value (Japanese flow follows it): H1 Kumo edges act as S/R
key_technicals.rsi: Ignore overbought in an uptrend - USDJPY can hold RSI > 70 for entire sessions. Divergence only matters at H4 levels

scalping_plan.sessions: Tokyo 02:00-06:00 SAST, London open 09:00-11:00 SAST, NY 14:30-17:00 SAST

steps: At 02:00 SAST check H4/H1 trend; if trending, wait for first M5 pullback to 9/21 EMA after Tokyo open
Enter on M1 engulfing at the EMA in trend direction
SL beyond pullback low/high, TP 8-12 pips or next 0.25 round level
If H1 is ranging: mark Tokyo range by 05:00 SAST
In London/NY, wait for a sweep of the Tokyo high/low that closes back inside on M5
Enter toward the opposite side of the range, SL beyond sweep wick, TP mid-range then far side

scalping_plan.risk: Tightest-spread pair = best pure scalping vehicle on your forex list. Still avoid the exact 02:00 SAST open candle and Japanese data at 01:30/01:50 SAST.

steps: H4 trend + price above/below H1 21 EMA = bias
Enter M15 pullbacks to 21 EMA or shallow fib (23.6-38.2%)
Trail behind M15 swings; trend days run 60-100 pips - let the runner work

after_hours_00_05_sast.conditions: GOOD window. 00:00-02:00 is quiet pre-Tokyo drift; 02:00-05:00 is live Tokyo trading with real volume. Japanese data drops 01:30/01:50 SAST.
after_hours_00_05_sast.verdict: TRADEABLE from 02:00 SAST. Best forex instrument on your list for this window.
playbook: 00:00-02:00: stand aside or fade tiny extremes; mark late-NY high/low
02:00: expect an opening drive - let the first 15 min print, then trade the first pullback (setup_1)
If Tokyo opens inside a tight range, trade the range edges until a M15 close breaks out
Take 6-12 pip targets; the whole window often ranges 25-40 pips

invalidations_and_traps: Never short 'because it's too high' near big figures in an uptrend - grind continues longer than expected
Intervention risk: parabolic candles of 100+ pips near multi-decade highs are not technical - stand aside
London's first move against the Tokyo trend is often a trap - wait for the sweep-and-reclaim
